name: Read Chroma DB
description: Read Vector Embeddings from Chroma DB Collection gives user query
input: It takes in a DataFrame as input

fields.name: userQuery
fields.title: Query Column
fields.description: Column containing the raw user query text used to perform similarity search against the ChromaDB collection.

fields.name: userQueryEmbeddings
fields.title: Query Embeddings Column
fields.description: Column containing precomputed vector embeddings for each query, used directly for nearest-neighbor search.

fields.name: collection
fields.title: Collection Name (case sensitive)
fields.description: Name of the ChromaDB collection to query. Collection names are case sensitive and must exist prior to execution.

fields.name: topK
fields.title: Top K
fields.description: Number of most similar vectors to return for each query based on similarity scoring.
